title: Staff Engineer, CRM Salesforce (AI-enabled Application Development)
company_focus: Digital product engineering and IT services
description:
Company Description

👋🏼We're Nagarro.

We are a Digital Product Engineering company that is scaling
in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences
that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at scale across
all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist
everywhere in the world (17700+ experts across 39 countries,
to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non-
hierarchical. We're looking for great new colleagues. That's
where you come in!

Job Description

REQUIREMENTS:

- Total Experience 6+ Years
- Strong hands-on experience in Salesforce development,
  including Apex, LWC, Aura, Flows, SOQL/SOSL, and API
  integrations.
- Proficiency with Salesforce DX and DevOps processes.
- Experience with AI-driven development tools, generative AI
  assistants, prompt engineering, and AI-based testing.
- Understanding of ML model integration, NLP, and predictive
  analytics.
- Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, Git version
  control, and static code analysis tools.
- Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication
  skills.
- Preferred experience with Salesforce AI tools (Einstein GPT,
  Einstein Next Best Action) and relevant Salesforce
  certifications

RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Writing and reviewing great quality code
- Integrate AI tools, including generative AI coding
  assistants, into Salesforce development workflows.
- Use AI for Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), Aura, and
  integration code generation and optimization.
- Implement AI-based code reviews, quality checks, and
  automated documentation generation.
- Design, develop, and maintain Salesforce solutions using
  Apex, LWC, Aura Components, SOQL/SOSL, Salesforce Flows,
  and REST/SOAP APIs.
- Utilize Salesforce DX and DevOps tools to streamline
  development, deployment, and CI/CD pipelines.
- Work with AI-driven testing tools, prompt engineering, and
  ML model integration via APIs.
- Apply NLP and predictive analytics concepts where
  applicable.
- Manage source control using Git and implement CI/CD
  pipelines using Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or
  similar tools.
- Use static code analysis tools to ensure code quality and
  adherence to standards.
- Collaborate with development, QA, and release teams to embed
  AI-driven automation across the SDLC.
- Provide guidance on best practices for AI integration in
  Salesforce development to ensure scalable and maintainable
  solutions.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science,
Information Technology, or a related field.

Utilize Salesforce DX and DevOps tools to streamline development, deployment, and CI/CD pipelines

use_cases: CRM application development with AI-assisted coding workflows
Automated code generation and optimization for Salesforce platforms
Predictive analytics integration in CRM systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Salesforce CRM development role where AI tools are
used to enhance the development workflow (code generation,
testing, documentation), not to build AI systems themselves.
The role focuses on Salesforce development with AI
assistants augmenting the process rather than building,
training, or deploying ML models.
